description:
Advances: mutagen.cli

Deliverable:
- Mix task skeleton at `lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex` (module `Mix.Tasks.Mutagen`)
  with a private dispatch table so the state machine error paths can be
  unit-tested by injecting fake collaborators.
- CLI parser at `lib/mutagen_ex/cli.ex` (module `MutagenEx.CLI`) using
  `OptionParser` only — no external CLI dependency. Parses `--scope` (repeatable),
  `--tests` (repeatable), `--timeout-ms <int>`, `--seed <int>`, `--json <path>`.
- Config struct at `lib/mutagen_ex/config.ex` (module `MutagenEx.Config`).
- Types module at `lib/mutagen_ex/types.ex` (module `MutagenEx.Types`) holding
  shared `@type` definitions (e.g., `%MutationSite{}`, `%Report{}`).
- Project scaffolding: confirm `mix.exs` is the v1 shape (Elixir ~> 1.16, no
  third-party deps), `.formatter.exs` follows community default, `.gitignore`
  covers `_build/`, `deps/`, `cover/`, `erl_crash.dump`. Delete any committed
  `erl_crash.dump`.
- `test/test_helper.exs` configured for ExUnit.
- README skeleton (full content lands in S8).

Verification:
- Tests to pass: `mix test test/mutagen_ex/cli_test.exs`. Covers
  spec-verification stubs `mutagen.cli.v1`, `mutagen.cli.v2`,
  `mutagen.cli.v4` (the `mix help mutagen` stub).
- Behaviors to demonstrate: scenarios `mutagen.cli.s1` through `mutagen.cli.s9`
  in `.spec/specs/cli.spec.md`, plus `OptionParser` edge cases (repeated
  `--scope`, negative integers in `--timeout-ms`).
- `mix compile --warnings-as-errors` must be clean.

Out of Scope (files):
- `lib/mutagen_ex/coverage_runner.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/baseline.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/mutators/**`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/scope_resolver.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/test_selector.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/json_reporter.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/ast_cache.ex`
- `test/fixtures/**`
- `test/mutagen_ex/integration/**`

Allowed touches (this stage may modify):
- `mix.exs`
- `.formatter.exs`
- `.gitignore`
- `README.md` (skeleton only)
- `lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/cli.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/config.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/types.ex`
- `test/mutagen_ex/cli_test.exs`
- `test/test_helper.exs`

Out of Scope (intent):
- No implementation of any pipeline phase. The mix task dispatches to
  collaborators that don't exist yet; integration tests for the orchestration
  state machine live in S6.
- No third-party deps. No `nimble_options`, no `optimus`.
- Do not implement scope or test target parsing here beyond storing the raw
  strings on `%Config{}`. Validation and resolution live in S3a / S3b.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly with `--warnings-as-errors`
- [ ] `mix test test/mutagen_ex/cli_test.exs` passes
- [ ] Spec verification passes (`mutagen.cli.v1`, `.v2`, `.v4`)
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED
Session: fa1552c1-29af-4847-9fbc-5065c95d3be9
Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-dev-mz-mutagen-ex/fa1552c1-29af-4847-9fbc-5065c95d3be9.jsonl

Commit: efd165433cfb469880fd6bbdb3c3908600943fcf
Stage worktree: /Users/mz/dev/mz/mutagen_ex-mutagen-wrd.1
Stage branch: mutagen-wrd.1/scaffold-cli-config-types (off epic/mutagen-wrd)

Files touched (Allowed touches only, plus spec-stub flips):
- lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex                  [new]
- lib/mutagen_ex/cli.ex                     [new]
- lib/mutagen_ex/config.ex                  [new]
- lib/mutagen_ex/types.ex                   [new]
- test/mutagen_ex/cli_test.exs              [new]
- README.md                                 [skeleton replacement]
- .spec/specs/cli.spec.md                   [verification stub flips only — see below]

Tests added (test/mutagen_ex/cli_test.exs, 37 ExUnit tests in MutagenEx.CLITest):
- parse/1 successful flag combinations (covers s1, s3 behaviour with non-self MFA)
- parse/1 --timeout-ms positive/default/zero/negative/non-integer (covers r3, s4)
- parse/1 --seed integer/default/negative (covers r4, s5 at the parse seam)
- parse/1 --json absent/path (covers r5)
- parse/1 missing --scope, missing --tests, empty argv (covers r1, r2, s2)
- parse/1 --no-json refusal in both positions (covers r7, s8)
- parse/1 self-mutation refusal for module/MFA/Mix.Tasks.Mutagen, with
  file-path-not-caught and non-MutagenEx-accepted negative tests (covers r8, s9)
- parse/1 unknown long flag + stray positional arg
- Mix.Tasks.Mutagen.run/2 dispatch table: happy path invokes pipeline (s6 seam);
  parse-failure invokes reporter and returns {:error, ...} (s2 dispatch);
  --no-json dispatch (s8); self-mutation dispatch (s9); pipeline-raise seam (s7)
- Mix.Tasks.Mutagen.@moduledoc renders every required section (Synopsis, Flags,
  Examples, Constraints, Exit Codes, Known Caveats) and every r9 caveat keyword
  (covers v4)

Verification stubs flipped (in .spec/specs/cli.spec.md):
- mutagen.cli.v1  execute: false -> true   (mix test test/mutagen_ex/cli_test.exs)
- mutagen.cli.v2  execute: false -> true   (mix test … --only exit_codes)
- mutagen.cli.v4  execute: false -> true   (mix help mutagen)
- mutagen.cli.v3  left at execute: false  — covers r8/s9 via end_to_end_test.exs,
  which is in S6 (out of scope here per ticket Out of Scope (files)).

Audit-expanded scope: n/a (iteration 1, no prior audit bounce).

Deferred must requirements: none. r1-r5, r7 fully covered by CLI tests. r6 is the
exit-code contract — verified at the dispatch-seam level here (errors return
{:error, ...} and invoke reporter; happy path returns :ok). Full exit-code wiring
to System.halt and JSON error doc emission lands with MutagenEx.JsonReporter (S5)
and the orchestration state machine (S6). The S1 ticket explicitly scopes those
out: the placeholder error reporter in Mix.Tasks.Mutagen calls System.halt(2)
with a clearly-marked stand-in message until S5 lands. r8 raw-string heuristic
is in place; the full resolution-based refusal is owned by the scope resolver
(S3a) and pipeline entry (S6). r9 caveats are all in the moduledoc.

Local sanity check (run on stage worktree):
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors  : clean
- mix test                          : 38 tests + 1 doctest, 0 failures
- mix help mutagen                  : renders all required sections
- mix format --check-formatted      : clean
- mutagen.cli.v1, v2, v4 commands run from .spec stubs all pass

Summary: Built the v1 CLI surface for mix mutagen — a pure OptionParser-based
parser (MutagenEx.CLI), the parsed-input struct (MutagenEx.Config) with raw
scope/test strings preserved for downstream resolution, shared type
declarations (MutagenEx.Types), and a Mix task (Mix.Tasks.Mutagen) whose
run/2 takes a dispatch table so error paths and the pipeline-entry seam are
unit-testable today, before MutagenEx.JsonReporter and the orchestration
state machine exist. Spec verification stubs v1, v2, v4 flipped to
execute: true; v3 left at false since it covers a self-mutation end-to-end
test that lives in S6.

title: S1: Scaffold + CLI + Config + Types
